raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Are you seeking a detailed critique of the research content, logic, and novelty, or just a general overall impression of the draft?","rationale":{"R1.2":"The vague delegation 'What do you think?' on a research draft implies centrally expecting an assessment of the argument's logical consistency.","R1.3":"Providing an opinion on the draft centrally involves checking if claims align with the reported evidence.","R1.4":"An opinion on a research draft typically includes a central assessment of its novelty relative to prior work.","RX.1":"The delegation centrally expects consideration of whether uncertainties are properly disclosed in the draft.","RX.2":"Feedback on the draft centrally involves identifying and avoiding overclaims.","RX.3":"The opinion should centrally adhere to the scope of the presented research.","RX.4":"Given the drug discovery topic, the response should centrally avoid suggesting downstream harms.","RX.5":"The delegation centrally requires ensuring provenance and traceability of data and methods in the feedback."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Are you seeking a detailed critique of the research content, logic, and novelty, or just a general overall impression of the draft?

rationale.R1.2: The vague delegation 'What do you think?' on a research draft implies centrally expecting an assessment of the argument's logical consistency.
rationale.R1.3: Providing an opinion on the draft centrally involves checking if claims align with the reported evidence.
rationale.R1.4: An opinion on a research draft typically includes a central assessment of its novelty relative to prior work.
rationale.RX.1: The delegation centrally expects consideration of whether uncertainties are properly disclosed in the draft.
rationale.RX.2: Feedback on the draft centrally involves identifying and avoiding overclaims.
rationale.RX.3: The opinion should centrally adhere to the scope of the presented research.
rationale.RX.4: Given the drug discovery topic, the response should centrally avoid suggesting downstream harms.
rationale.RX.5: The delegation centrally requires ensuring provenance and traceability of data and methods in the feedback.
